title: Resource Quotas — What's next
text:

detailed example for how to use resource quota
.
Read the ResourceQuota
API reference
Learn about

for more information.

Quota support for priority class design document

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
